theory.canonical_statement: Unified-field behavior emerges not from merging forces at high energy but from a topological bottleneck at the TZP where a lemniscate structure causes dimensional collapse from four to two dimensions, forcing interactions to become coherent at accessible energies.
theory.technical_interpretation: Unified-field behavior emerges not from merging forces at high energy but from a topological bottleneck at the TZP where a lemniscate structure causes dimensional collapse from four to two dimensions, forcing interactions to become coherent at accessible energies.
